2604.22825.title: SGP-SAM: Self-Gated Prompting for Transferring 3D Segment Anything Models to Lesion Segmentation
2604.22825.paper_summary: Large segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) have reshaped promptable segmentation in natural images, and recent efforts have extended these models to medical images and volumetric settings. However, directly transferring a 3D SAM-style model to lesion segmentation remains challenging due to (i) weak spatial representational capacity for small, irregular targets in intermediate features, and (ii) extreme foreground-background imbalance in 3D volumes.We propose SGP-SAM, a self-gated prompting framework for efficient and effective transfer to 3D lesion segmentation. Our key component, the Self-Gated Prompting Module (SGPM), performs conditional multi-scale spatial enhancement: a lightweight multi-channel gating unit predicts whether the current features require additional multi-scale fusion, and only then activates a Multi-Scale Feature Fusion Block to enrich spatial context. To further address small-lesion learning, we design a Zoom Loss that up-weights lesion-focused supervision by combining Dice and a voxel-balanced focal term.Experiments on MSD Liver Tumor and MSD Brain Tumor (enhancing tumor) show consistent gains over strong transfer baselines based on SAM-Med3D. On MSD Liver Tumor, SGP-SAM improves mDice by 7.3% over fine-tuning.
2604.22825.paper_summary_zh: 大型分割基礎模型如Segment Anything Model (SAM)已經重塑了自然圖像中的可提示分割，最近的努力已將這些模型擴展到醫學圖像和體積設定。然而，將3D SAM風格模型直接轉移到病變分割仍然具有挑戰性，原因在於(i)中間特徵對於小型、不規則目標的空間表示能力較弱，以及(ii)3D體積中極端的前景-背景不平衡。我們提出了SGP-SAM，一個自門控提示框架，用於高效且有效地轉移到3D病變分割。我們的關鍵組件，自門控提示模塊(SGPM)，執行條件多尺度空間增強：一個輕量級的多通道門控單元預測當前特徵是否需要額外的多尺度融合，並僅在此時啟動多尺度特徵融合塊以豐富空間上下文。為了進一步解決小病變學習的問題，我們設計了一個Zoom Loss，通過結合Dice和一個體素平衡的焦點項來提高以病變為重點的監督權重。在MSD肝腫瘤和MSD腦腫瘤（增強腫瘤）的實驗中，基於SAM-Med3D的強轉移基線顯示出一致的增益。在MSD肝腫瘤上，SGP-SAM將mDice提高了7.3%。
2604.22825.author: Zixuan Tang et.al.
